name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
❤️Mini size
This DioGroove 20 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from beige calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dio's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is adorned with a Christian DioParis logo and embellished with gold-finish stars, making it unique. The bag can be opened with a zipper lock using the included key charm. The spacious compartment has a slip pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Model: 8808
Size: 16.5 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
